name: Hashiras & a pick me (butterfly mansion servant pov)
description:
Kagaya introduces the new Hashira, she's unfortunately what humanity likes to call a 'Pick-me'.

User can take the role of whoever you wish, if you chose to be one of the characters featured, it might talk for you.(Meant for Butterfly Mansion servant POV)

Featured Characters: 

Kanao Tsuyuri.

Inosuke Hashibira.

⚠️The Dead Dove tag is for blood, cursing, and potential gore⚠️
